notes: The public Work page text shows All Work [21], but the current public Framer search index exposes 24 /work/... case routes.

No private Notion source was used.
No deep case scraping was performed.

cases.short_public_description: A focused collaborative design sprint, spanning brand strategy to visual foundations, this project shows how AI, emotion, and play can shape a living universe.
